content.text:
✅ **Λvi System Identity Test Successful**

I've successfully created a ticket assigned to Avi (Λvi) without needing to load an external agent file. This demonstrates that the new system identity implementation is working correctly.

**Test Results:**
- Created ticket using TodoWrite system 
- Assigned to Λvi (system identity)
- No external agent file loading required
- System maintains Λvi identity natively

The system is functioning as designed - Λvi can operate as Chief of Staff with built-in identity rather than requiring separate agent file loading.
